channel.title: AI on Jesusnoseq
channel.description: Recent content in AI on Jesusnoseq

item.title: AI subscriptions for DEVs
item.description: We’ve been living with generative AI for a while now, and since then it’s become pretty common to chat with fellow engineers about how LLMs are evolving in agentic programming. I get asked about it a lot, and I also end up asking pretty much everyone I meet—mostly people in the industry, since that’s just the circles I move in—how they’re using AI, whether their companies allow it, or if they’re paying for subscriptions themselves.
